[{'text': 'Excellent! Now I can see the robot is at (8.05, 11.76) and the red dot is now in the **upper white corridor** — the same corridor as the green destination! The robot has successfully moved from the middle corridor to the upper corridor. The green destination is to the **right** of the robot in this upper corridor.

The front (north) has 2.87m clear, but I need to go **east** (right) toward the green destination. Let me rotate right (clockwise) to face east.

Current heading is ~102° (north). I need to face east (0°). That means rotating right by about -102°.', 'type': 'text'}, {'id': 'toolu_0153Xi1mkGMHyBB8zUAq6n41', 'caller': {'type': 'direct'}, 'input': {'angle_degrees': -102}, 'name': 'rotate', 'type': 'tool_use'}]
